title: Python Developer (Fresher)
description: Looking for a Python developer with Django/FastAPI experience. 0-2 years. Skills: Python, Django, PostgreSQL, REST APIs. B.Tech CSE preferred. CTC: 4-6 LPA.

title: AI/ML Engineer - LLM Applications
description: Building LLM-powered products. Need someone with LangChain, RAG, vector databases experience. 0-3 years. Python, FastAPI, React. We value self-learners. CTC: 5-8 LPA.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Join our payments team. React, Node.js, Python, PostgreSQL. 2-4 years experience. Strong problem-solving skills required. Understanding of distributed systems a plus.

title: Software Developer Intern
description: 6-month internship. Python, Django, React. Stipend: 25K/month. Convert to full-time based on performance. B.Tech 2023-2024 passout.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (5+ years)
description: Senior role. 5+ years in distributed systems, Go, Java, C++. Kubernetes, microservices architecture. PhD preferred.

title: QA Analyst
description: Manual testing role. Selenium, JIRA, test case documentation. 0-2 years. CTC: 3-4 LPA.

title: Django Developer
description: Small team building a healthcare platform. Django, DRF, Celery, PostgreSQL, Docker. 0-2 years. We care about code quality, not pedigree. CTC: 4-7 LPA.

title: React Frontend Developer
description: React, TypeScript, Next.js. Build student-facing dashboards. 1-3 years. Startups welcome. CTC: 5-8 LPA.

title: LangChain Developer (AI Agents)
description: Build multi-agent systems with LangGraph, MCP protocol. Python, FastAPI, vector databases. Experience with RAG pipelines. Freshers with strong projects welcome.

title: Customer Support Executive
description: Voice process. Night shifts. English fluency required. 0-1 years. CTC: 2-3 LPA.
